subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down when the Wronged One was in manifest sorrow, for the oppressors had imprisoned My loved ones in Ṭá and in diverse lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل اذ کان المظلوم فی حزن مبین قد حبس الظالمون اولیائی فی الطاء و فی دیار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
